title: 10 precautions to take when using Vaccinium myrtillus (Bilberry) for medicinal purposes
intro: When using Vaccinium myrtillus, also known as bilberry, for medicinal purposes, it is important to take certain precautions. First, it is essential to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen, including bilberry. This is especially important for individuals with existing medical conditions or those who are taking medications, as bilberry may interact with certain drugs. Pregnant and breastfeeding women should also avoid using bilberry without consulting a healthcare professional. Additionally, it is recommended to use standardized extracts of bilberry, as they provide consistent levels of active compounds. Overuse of bilberry can lead to adverse effects such as stomach upset and increased risk of bleeding, so it is crucial to follow dosage recommendations carefully.
